training_status: Active athlete: weightlifting, swimming, mountain biking, surfing, CrossFit; 5-6 days per week

benefits.description: DOMS has pretty much become a thing of the past after 2 weeks on testosterone
Can push himself harder, heavier and further than last month

protocol_notes: Age 46, does not want more children. Pre-cycle testosterone was in the top 25% of normal range. Currently 2 weeks into testosterone cycle at 300mg/week with 14-18 weeks remaining. Had an 8-week Ostarine/Cardarine cycle previously. Considering blasting and cruising long-term rather than PCT. Wife is also cycling Anavar. Has PCT drugs on hand. Plans to retest testosterone levels in a few weeks.
